duas.title: Moonsighting of the Month of Ramadhan - Rabbi wa Rabbukallah
duas.description: When your eyes fall on the new moon, you must not point to it; rather you should turn yourself towards the kiblah, raise both your hands towards the sky, and address the new moon with the following words:

segments.translation: Your and my Lord is Allah; the Lord of the worlds.
O Allah: (please do) cause this crescent to carry with it for us security and faith
And safety and Islam
And expedition to whatever You love and please.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي شَهْرِنَا هذَا،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma bārik lanā fī shahrinā hādhā,
segments.translation: O Allah: (please do) bless us in this month,
And confer upon us with its goodness and aid,

segments.arabic: وَاصْرِفْ عَنَّا ضُرّهُ وَشَرّهُ وَبَلاءَهُ وَفِتْنَتَهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa-ṣrif ʿannā ḍurrahu wa-sharrahu wa-balāʾahu wa-fitnatahu.
segments.translation: And save us from its harm, evil, ordeals, and sedition.

duas.title: Allahumma Qad Hazara
duas.description: Imam Ja`far Sadiq (a.s) is also reported to have said: When you see the new moon of Ramadhan, you may say the following:

segments.translation: O Allah: the month of Ramadan has commenced,
And You have made obligatory upon us to observe fasting during it,
And You revealed the Qur'an in it,

segments.arabic: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيّنَاتٍ مِنَ الهُدَى وَالفُرْقَانِ.
segments.transliteration: hudan li-n-nāsi wa-bayyinātin mina l-hudā wa-l-furqān.
segments.translation: As guidance for people and clear proofs of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong).
O Allah: (please) help us observe fasting in it,
And accept it from us,
And keep us safe during it,
And help us observe it adequately,

segments.arabic: وَسَلّمْهُ لَنَا فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَعَافِيَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa-sallimhu lanā fī yusrin minka wa-ʿāfiyah,
segments.translation: And keep it sound for us with easiness and good health from You.
You verily have power over all things.
O the All-beneficent, O the All-merciful

duas.title: Allahumma Ahillahu Alayna
duas.description: It has been narrated that when the Holy Prophet (a.s) would see the new moon of Ramadhan, he would turn his face to the kiblah direction and say the following:

segments.translation: O Allah: (please do) cause this crescent to carry with it for us security and faith
And safety and Islam
And encompassing good health and repulsion of ailments,
And assistance on praying, observing fasting, and doing acts of worship,
And on reciting the Qur'an.
O Allah: (please do) keep us sound for the month of Ramadan,
And accept our deeds during it,
And save us during it,
Until the month of Ramadan will not elapse

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ عَفَوْتَ عَنَّا وَغَفَرْتَ لَنَا وَرَحِمْتَنَا.
segments.transliteration: wa-qad ʿafawta ʿannā wa-ghafarta lanā wa-raḥimtanā.
segments.translation: Except that You have pardoned us, forgiven us, and had mercy upon us

duas.title: Ayyuhal Khalqul Muti
duas.description: It is recommended, at the sight of the new moon of Ramadhan, to say the supplication number forty-three of the al- Sahifah al-Kamilah al-Sajjadiyyah. Sayyid Ibn Tawus narrated that Imam `Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-Abideen (a.s), once, gazed at the new moon of Ramadhan while he was walking. He therefore stopped and said the following:

segments.translation: O obedient creature,
speedy and untiring,
frequenter of the mansions of determination,
moving about in the sphere of governance!
I have faith in Him Who lights up darknesses through you,
illuminates jet-black shadows by you,
appointed you one of the signs of His kingdom
And one of the marks of His authority,
So, He identified time through You,
And humbled you through increase and decrease,
And rising and setting,
And illumination and eclipse.

segments.arabic: فِي كُلّ ذلِكَ أَنْتَ لَهُ مُطِيعٌ،
segments.transliteration: Fī kulli dhālika anta lahu muṭīʿ,
segments.translation: In all of this you are obedient to Him,
And prompt toward His will.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَهُ مَا أَعْجَبَ مَا دَبّرَ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ!
segments.transliteration: Subḥānahu mā aʿjaba mā dabbara min amrik!
segments.translation: Glory be to Him! How wonderful is what He has arranged in Your situation!
How subtle what He has made for Your task!

segments.arabic: جَعَلَكَ مِفْتَاحَ شَهْرٍ حَادِثٍ لأَمْرٍ حَادِثٍ،
segments.transliteration: Jaʿalaka miftāḥa shahrin ḥādithin li-amrin ḥādith,
segments.translation: He has made You the key to a new month for a new situation.
So I ask Allah, my Lord and Your Lord,
my Creator and Your Creator,
my Determiner and Your Determiner,
my Form-giver and Your Form-giver,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُصَلّيَ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: An yuṣalliya ʿalā Muḥammadin wa-Āli Muḥammad,
segments.translation: that He bless Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَكَ هِلالَ بَرَكَةٍ لا تَمْحَقُهَا الأَيَّامُ،
segments.transliteration: Wa-an yajʿalaka hilāla barakatin lā tamḥaquha l-ayyām,
segments.translation: and appoint You a crescent of blessings not effaced by days
and of purity not defiled by sins;
a crescent of security from blights
and of safety from evil deeds;
a crescent of auspiciousness containing no misfortune,
of prosperity accompanied by no adversity,
of ease not mixed with difficulty,
of good unstained by evil;
a crescent of security and faith,
favor and good-doing,
safety and submission!

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammadin wa-Āli Muḥammad
segments.translation: O Allah, bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْنَا مِنْ أَرْضَى مَنْ طَلَعَ عَلَيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: Wa-jʿalnā min arḍā man ṭalaʿa ʿalayh,
segments.translation: place us among the most satisfied of those over whom the crescent has risen,
the purest of those who have looked upon it,
the most fortunate of those who have worshiped You under it;
give us the success during [the new month] to repent,
preserve us within it from misdeeds and exposition to punishment,
allot to us within it thanksgiving for Your favor,
clothe us during it in the shields of well-being,

segments.arabic: وَأَتْمِمْ عَلَيْنَا بِاسْتِكْمَالِ طَاعَتِكَ فِيهِ المِنّةَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa-atmim ʿalaynā bi-stikmāli ṭāʿatika fīhi l-minnah,
segments.translation: and complete for us Your kindness by perfecting therein obedience to You!
Surely You are All-kind, Praiseworthy.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّى اللّهُ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِهِ الطّيّبِينَ،
segments.transliteration: Wa-ṣallā Allāhu ʿalā Muḥammadin wa-Ālihi ṭ-Ṭayyibīn,
segments.translation: And bless Muhammad and his Household, the good, the pure.

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ لَنَا فِيهِ عَوْناً مِنْكَ عَلَى مَا نَدَبْتَنَا إلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa-jʿal lanā fīhi ʿawnan minka ʿalā mā nadabtanā ilayh
segments.translation: And grant us aid from You to carry out that which You have ordered us to do in it;
Such as the obedience to You which You have made incumbent upon us,

segments.arabic: وَتَقَبّلْهَا إنّكَ الأَكْرَمُ مِنْ كُلّ كَرِيمٍ،
segments.transliteration: Wa-taqabbalhā innaka l-Akramu min kulli karīm,
segments.translation: and accept them from us, for You are the most Generous of all those who show generosity
and the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.
Respond! Respond! O the Lord of the Worlds.

duas.title: Syeda Fatima (sa) Dua
duas.description: Syeda Fatima (sa) Dua(35 sahifa) moonsighting Ramadhan month

segments.arabic: رَبُّنَا وَ رَبُّكَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: Our Lord and your Lord is Allah, Lord of the worlds
O Allah make it a blessed crescent for us
and grant us the chance to fast in it

segments.arabic: وَ وَ سَلِّمُنَا فِيهِ، وَ تَسَلَّمْنَا مِنْهُ،
segments.translation: and keep us safe in it and make us receive (good) from it
in ease and health
and use us in it for Your obedience
surely You have power over all things
